text:
Once upon a time in a lovely little town, there was a garden bench under an old oak tree. Every afternoon, an old owl would perched there. One day, a young raccoon decided to come visit.

"The owl!"

The owl hooted softly.

"I miss those chats."

A laugh.

"Somehow I prefer o'clock."

The owl nodded.

Each visit went well until one day. "You know those hawk eggs down there?"

They hooted. "Oh!"

"The babies grow really fast."

They didn't laugh.

"You've got those big wings. Can you fly?"

They hooted. "You think so?"

"You always talk."

They stayed a while.

"One more story."

It was boring.

"I miss you."

They flew away.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
